summary: All four requirements (REQ-1 through REQ-4) have been implemented. The 'Toys Come to Play' haunted house has been added with the specified tagline, Blippy and Jiffy characters with the scene description integrated into 22 scenes information, a 2030 investment announcement featuring all four costume characters plus princesses, and audition information emphasizing vocal skills with the 'some sing some don't' clarification.
